seed_instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions.
org_constraint: Use the phrase "upcoming exhibitions" exactly three times.
instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions. Use the phrase "upcoming exhibitions" exactly three times. Avoid using the phrase "upcoming exhibitions".
response:
Subject: Inquiry about Current and Future Showings

Dear [Gallery Name] Team,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am a great admirer of the work featured at [Gallery Name] and am very interested in visiting your space soon. I was hoping you could provide me with information regarding your current programming and any scheduled future events.

Specifically, I would be grateful if you could send me details on your forthcoming shows. I'm particularly interested in seeing what new collections or artists you plan to feature in the coming months.

Could you also direct me to a list or schedule detailing your next series of public displays?

Thank you very much for your time and assistance. I look forward to hearing from you soon and experiencing your curated selections.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number or preferred contact info]<turn|>
